papers.title: Collagen peptide supplementation reduces functional joint pain in knee and hip: a randomized controlled trial
papers.summary: 154名受試者每日服用5克持續12周，膝、髖關節功能性疼痛顯著減少。

papers.title: Specific Collagen Peptides Improve Endurance Performance and Lean Body Mass in Trained Women
papers.summary: 每日服用15克持續12周，顯著增加60分鐘跑步測試距離（+331m），並提升有氧代謝能力。

papers.title: Improvement of Functional Ankle Instability Following Supplementation with Specific Collagen Peptides
papers.summary: 50名慢性踝關節不穩受試者，每日服用5克持續6個月，顯著增強關節穩定性並減少扭傷次數。

papers.title: Specific collagen peptides improve bone mineral density and bone markers in postmenopausal women
papers.summary: 131名絕經後婦女每日服用FORTIBONE® 5克持續12個月，脊柱與股骨頸骨密度顯著增加。

papers.title: The Effectiveness of Specific Collagen Peptides on Osteoarthritis in Dogs
papers.summary: 體外與臨床研究顯示能刺激犬類軟骨基質合成，減少發炎因子，顯著改善跛行與活動能力。

papers.title: Oral intake of specific bioactive collagen peptides reduces skin wrinkles and increases dermal matrix synthesis
papers.summary: 每日口服VERISOL® 2.5克持續8周，眼周皺紋減少20%，真皮層膠原蛋白Type I表現提升。
